record.field: Case Assigned for Investigation
Action Required: Case Assigned for Investigation

div.p: Dear ,
A forensic case has been assigned to you as the Investigation Manager.

Confidentiality Notice: This communication contains information intended solely for official City of Cape Town business and must be handled in accordance with the City’s confidentiality and records management policies. Unauthorized use, disclosure, or distribution is prohibited.

record.field: Investigation Team Formed
Investigation Team Formed

div.p: You have been assigned to the investigation team for the following case:

Confidentiality Notice: This communication contains information intended solely for official City of Cape Town business and must be handled in accordance with the City’s confidentiality and records management policies. Unauthorized use, disclosure, or distribution is prohibited.

record.field: Investigation Plan Submitted for Review
Investigation Plan Submitted for Review – Approval Pending

div.p: Dear ,
The Investigation Plan for the following case has been submitted and requires your review:
Note: Please review and provide feedback within 3 business days.

Confidentiality Notice: This communication contains information intended solely for official City of Cape Town business and must be handled in accordance with the City’s confidentiality and records management policies. Unauthorized use, disclosure, or distribution is prohibited.

record.field: Investigation Report Submitted for Review
Investigation Report Submitted for Review – {{ object.name }}

The investigation report has been submitted and requires your review and approval.

Case Details:

  • Case ID: {{ object.name }}
  • Report Version: {{ object.report_version }}
  • Submitted By: {{ object.li_user_id.name }}
  • Submission Date: {{ format_date(ctx_today()) }}
  • Recommendations Count:3

SLA: Please review and provide feedback within 5 business days (by {{ object.sla_deadline_date }}).


Confidentiality Notice: This communication contains information intended solely for official City of Cape Town business and must be handled in accordance with the City’s confidentiality and records management policies. Unauthorized use, disclosure, or distribution is prohibited.
Investigation Report Ready for Final Approval
Investigation Report Ready for Final Approval – {{ object.name }} – Chief Review Required

The investigation report has been approved by the Manager and is now ready for your final review and signature.

Case Details:

  • Case ID: {{ object.name }}
  • Report Version: 1
  • Approved By (Manager): {{ object.user_id.name }}
  • Manager Approval Date: {{ format_datetime(ctx_today() }}

Overarching Memo: Ready for dispatch upon report approval.

Letter to ED: Ready for dispatch upon report approval.


Confidentiality Notice: This communication contains information intended solely for official City of Cape Town business and must be handled in accordance with the City’s confidentiality and records management policies. Unauthorized use, disclosure, or distribution is prohibited.
Line Referral Case Assigned – Investigation Required
Line Referral Case Assigned – {{ object.name }} – Investigation Required

A Line Referral case has been assigned to your directorate for investigation.

Case Details:

  • Case ID: {{ object.name }}
  • Case Type: Line Referral (LIN)
  • Nature of Allegation: {{ object.allegation_nature_id.name }}

Line Referral Case Summary Submitted – Review Required
Line Referral Case Summary Submitted – {{ object.name }} – Review Required

An investigation summary has been submitted by the assigned Nodal for the following Line Referral case:

Case Details:

  • Case ID: {{ object.name }}
  • Submitted By (Nodal): Nodal
  • Directorate: {{ object.directorate_id.name }}
  • Submission Date: {{ format_datetime(ctx_today() }}
  • Summary Brief: xyz

Action Required:
Please review the summary and close the case or request further action if needed.


Confidentiality Notice: This communication contains information intended solely for official City of Cape Town business and must be handled in accordance with the City’s confidentiality and records management policies. Unauthorized use, disclosure, or distribution is prohibited.
Case Request for Digital Access City Manager
{{ ctx.get('subject') }}

A Digital Access Permission Request has been initiated in the Case Management System.

Case Reference Number:
Case Title:
Directorate:
Lead Investigator:

The permission letter requesting digital access from to has been generated in the system and requires your review .

After your approval, the request will automatically be forwarded to the Chief Digital Officer for final approval.

Kind regards,
Ethics and Forensic Services
City of Cape Town
Case Request for Digital Access CDO
{{ ctx.get('subject') }}

div.p: The Digital Access Permission Request for the following case has been approved by the City Manager and requires your approval.

Case Reference Number:
Case Title:
Directorate:
Lead Investigator:
The permission letter signed by the City Manager is available in the system for your review.Click Here
Please access the request and grant digital access to Lead Investigator from to

Kind regards,
Ethics and Forensic Services
City of Cape Town

record.field: In2it - Vendor Terms Of REFERENCE
Terms of Reference for conducting Investigation on {{ object.project_id.name}}

Dear ,

TERMS OF REFERENCE – OUTSOURCED ASSIGNMENT

The City of Cape Town (CCT), through the Office of the City Manager: Ethics and Forensic Services, hereby provides the attached Web Link of Terms of Reference (ToR) in respect of the following assignment:

Case ID:
Case Reference Number:
Case Title:
Directorate:
Nature of Allegation:
Authorization Date:

You are requested to review the attached Terms of Reference and confirm your acceptance or rejection of this assignment in accordance with the provisions of this tender.

In terms of the contractual requirements:

• You are required to acknowledge receipt of this instruction.
• You have forty-eight () hours from the time this instruction was issued to formally accept or decline the assignment.
• Upon acceptance, you are required to submit a detailed project plan within seven (7) calendar days, including:
– Resources to be utilized
– Breakdown of professional skill sets and experience
– Detailed pricing aligned to the approved pricing schedule
– Milestones and timeframes
– Confirmation of capacity and expertise

Please ensure that all submissions comply with the Terms of Reference and tender provisions.

All correspondence and submissions must be sent to:




For technical or specification-related queries, please contact us:


Principal Forensic Officer: Forensic Services
Mobile:
Email:

We look forward to your formal response within the stipulated timeframe.

Kind regards,



Principal Forensic Officer
Ethics and Forensic Services
Office of the City Manager
City of Cape Town

M:
E:
False
Case Overarching Memo CM
Overarching Memo for Authorization – {{ object.project_id.name }} – Electronic Issue of Forensic Report

div.p: Dear City Manager
Please find attached to this email, the letter from the Chief:EFS as well as the EFS report and exhibits. Also attached is the letter to the ED for their information/action.

Case ID:
Submitted By: , Chief of Ethics & Forensics
Submission Date:

record.field: Case Overarching Memo Executive Directorate : Action
Recommendations Assigned for implementation – {{ object.project_id.name }}

div.p: Dear Executive Director

Recommendations for the below investigation have been assigned to you for review and implementation. PFA report, memo, Annexures, Exhibits in your system and provide feedback within 30 days. Click Here

Case ID :
Number of Recommendations :
Implementation Timeline :30 days

Confidentiality Notice :This communication contains information intended solely for official City of Cape Town business and must be handled in accordance with the City's confidentiality and records management policies.
